name: Ninja Art: Bowing the Mountain
outcome: [AttackerName] slips one of [AttackerHisOrHer] silken clad feet free from [AttackerHisOrHer] metal greaves and gracefully twirls into a spinning kick aimed directly for [TargetName]'s face!|n|But just before [AttackerHisOrHer] foot hits [TargetName], it stops less than an inch away from [TargetHimOrHer], and [TargetName]’s startled breath forces [TargetHimOrHer] to take in a lungful of [AttackerHisOrHer] foot’s intense, spicy scent, stoking [TargetName]’s arousal.
miss: [AttackerName] slips one of [AttackerHisOrHer] silken clad feet free from [AttackerHisOrHer] metal greaves and gracefully twirls into a spinning kick aimed directly for [TargetName]’s face!|n|But [TargetName] manages to narrowly dodge the kick, and by the time [TargetHeOrShe] recovers from the attack, [AttackerName] has already slipped [AttackerHisOrHer] metal greave back on with practiced ease, ready to continue the fight!
